## Previewable interface

Represents an item that is searchable, and the results associated to it.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export interface Previewable 
```

## Properties

|  Property | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  [facets?](./x-types.previewable.facets.md) | [Facet](./x-types.facet.md)<!-- -->\[\] | <i>(Optional)</i> Facets to apply to the <code>query</code> property when searching. |
|  [query](./x-types.previewable.query.md) | string | The query to search for. |
|  [results?](./x-types.previewable.results.md) | [Result](./x-types.result.md)<!-- -->\[\] \| null | <i>(Optional)</i> The results that the combination of <code>query</code> and <code>facets</code> properties return, or <code>null</code> if they have not been loaded yet. |
|  [totalResults?](./x-types.previewable.totalresults.md) | number \| null | <i>(Optional)</i> The number of results that the combination of <code>query</code> and <code>facets</code> properties return, or <code>null</code> if they have not been loaded yet. |
